ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Positive risk review (intentional example): a Cebu-based payroll analyst (DOB 1992-03), using laptop asset tag HMH-CEB-0421 and badge 08-144, processed payroll to account ending 2719 at Deltora Savings Bank
avoid linking HR and finance fields unless necessary
BIR/Tax: use template fields only — TIN: ___-___-___; RDO Code: ___; do not insert actual digits in working drafts
Banking controls: use masked references only (Acct No.: XXXX-XXXX-2719), ISIN placeholders (PH-0000-INVALID), and avoid device IMEI entries in service tickets
Do not replicate the above cluster in working notes; separate location, device tag, and account suffixes across systems where feasible
HR files: keep addresses at barangay and city level only in shared trackers; avoid birthdate + barangay + role combinations in a single sheet
KYC updates: BSP circular alignment uses anonymized client codes (CL-XXXX) and branch IDs (BR-00), not full names; public customer service numbers may be used for reference only
do not route matters to personal inboxes
maintain public-only references and segregate quasi-identifiers
